description: You are a Regulatory Affairs Manager at a pharmaceutical company. Apply the formatting requirements specified in the FDA style guide (/home/ga/Desktop/fda_rems_style_guide.txt) to the Mycophenolate Shared System REMS draft document (/home/ga/Documents/mycophenolate_rems_draft.odt). The document must include a formatted title, a 1x1 table 'Black Box' warning for the 'WARNING: EMBRYO-FETAL TOXICITY' paragraph, Heading 1 and Heading 2 styles, bulleted lists for stakeholder requirements, and a 2-column table for the assessment timetable. Save the completed document to /home/ga/Documents/mycophenolate_rems_draft.odt. The document is already open in Calligra Words.

bullet_list_items: Must be certified in the Mycophenolate REMS.
Must counsel patients on the risk of embryo-fetal toxicity.
Must enroll female patients of reproductive potential.
